title: S + stop/remember/forget + to V / V-ing（意思不同）

formulas.zh: 停下來去做某事、記得去做某事、忘記去做某事、嘗試去做某事、後悔去做某事
停止做某事、記得曾做過某事、忘記曾做過某事、嘗試做某事、後悔做過某事

explanation: 這類動詞接不定詞與動名詞時意義差異大。接to V通常表未來動作或意圖；接V-ing則表過去經驗或習慣。例如stop to V是「停下正在做的事去做另一件事」，stop V-ing則是「終止某習慣」。remember/forget to V強調未來任務，V-ing強調過去記憶。試題常考此對比，需注意上下文時態與語義關聯。

examples.eng: She stopped to answer the phone while cooking dinner.
examples.chi: 她在烹飪晚餐時停下來接電話。

examples.eng: He finally stopped smoking after years of struggle and effort.
examples.chi: 經過多年努力，他終於戒菸了。

examples.eng: I forgot to submit the assignment yesterday, which made the teacher angry.
examples.chi: 我昨天忘了繳交作業，這讓老師很生氣。

examples.eng: Do you remember playing basketball with us in high school?
examples.chi: 你記得高中時和我們打籃球嗎？

extension.tip: 判斷時看動作發生時間：to V多指未做或未來要做的事；V-ing多指已做過或現在進行中的事。另外注意句子整體時態與邏輯關係。若前句用過去簡單式，後接V-ing通常更自然。記住：to V=預期動作，V-ing=回顧動作。

examples.test: He regrets to tell you the bad news. vs. He regrets telling you the bad news.
examples.result: → 前者：他遺憾地通知你壞消息（現在的遺憾動作）；後者：他後悔曾經告訴你（過去的後悔）

examples.test: I tried to fix the car. vs. I tried fixing the car.
examples.result: → 前者：我試圖去修車（努力但未必成功）；後者：我嘗試修理車（試過這個方法）

examples.test: Don't forget to lock the door. vs. I'll never forget locking the door that night.
examples.result: → 前者：記得去鎖門（未來提醒）；後者：永難忘懷那晚鎖門的事（過去記憶）

extension.note: 關鍵口訣：to V看未來，V-ing看回顧；上文時態與邏輯決定動名詞形式。

parts: her on her birthday, so I called immediately.
exercises.sentence: I remembered to call her on her birthday, so I called immediately.
exercises.translation: 我記得在她生日時打電話給她，所以我立即撥打。

parts: her old friends and focused on her new life.
exercises.sentence: She stopped contacting her old friends and focused on her new life.
exercises.translation: 她停止聯繫舊友，專注於新生活。

parts: such harsh words to the student yesterday.
exercises.sentence: The teacher regretted saying such harsh words to the student yesterday.
exercises.translation: 老師後悔昨天對學生說那麼刺耳的話。

parts: the broken equipment, but it didn't work at all.
exercises.sentence: We tried to fix the broken equipment, but it didn't work at all.
exercises.translation: 我們試圖修理損壞的設備，但根本沒有用。
